scripts.generate:agent: node scripts/generateAgentActionCatalog.mjs && node scripts/generateAgentActionTypes.mjs && node scripts/generateAgentActionSchema.mjs && node scripts/generateAgentActionSummaries.mjs && node scripts/generateAgentToolCatalog.mjs && node scripts/generateAgentToolSchema.mjs
scripts.check:agent: node scripts/checkGeneratedAgentActionCatalog.mjs && node scripts/checkGeneratedAgentActionTypes.mjs && node scripts/checkGeneratedAgentActionSchema.mjs && node scripts/checkGeneratedAgentActionSummaries.mjs && node scripts/checkGeneratedAgentToolCatalog.mjs && node scripts/checkGeneratedAgentToolSchema.mjs
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && vite build
scripts.test:tsc: npm run test:tsc:src && npm run test:tsc:tests
